working_on.notes: Phases 01, 02, 03, 04 are completed. The public site is fully functional with realistic demo data (8 employers, 22 jobs). Next is implementing Employer Authentication (login, register) and their private dashboard.

pending_tasks.notes: Cơ chế JWT riêng cho employer, trang login/register, dashboard overview
CRUD tin tuyển dụng, xem danh sách ứng viên (Application)
CRM Admin duyệt bài, duyệt employer, cấp gói dịch vụ
Import Application thành Candidate trong CRM

recent_changes.description: Completed Phase 03: Job Listing & Detail (/viec-lam, /viec-lam/[slug]). Added filters and pagination.
Completed Phase 04: Company Profiles & Apply Form. (/cong-ty, /cong-ty/[slug], /ung-tuyen). Implemented Apply CV form with validation.
Overhauled demo data in seed.ts with 8 FDI employers, 8 logos, 22 realistic jobs, and 8 subscriptions.

errors_encountered.error: Playwright subagent failing due to 'target closed: could not read protocol padding: EOF'
errors_encountered.solution: Relied on manual inspection of captured screenshots and curl verification for routing and API calls. Verified visually via the single successful screenshot.

errors_encountered.error: Prisma types acting stale in IDE for new schemas
errors_encountered.solution: Types are correct at runtime; requires 'TypeScript: Restart TS Server' in IDE to clear the lint errors.

decisions_made.decision: Generate full, realistic Vietnamese demo data during seed
decisions_made.reason: Necessary to properly validate UI grids, text wrapping, and aesthetic layout of the public website without relying on 'Lorem Ipsum'.

decisions_made.decision: Apply Form handles file validation but skips actual Vercel Blob upload for MVP
decisions_made.reason: Focusing on completing the full navigation and data flow first. Real file uploading will be integrated in production deployment.
